items.titolo: I tested ChatGPT Images 2.0 vs. Gemini Nano Banana to see which is better - this model wins
items.descrizione: I put ChatGPT Images 2.0 and Gemini Nano Banana through nine image-generation tests. The winner was clear.

items.titolo: Windows 11 senza Copilot: pulizia solo apparente?
items.descrizione: Microsoft ha iniziato a rimuovere Copilot da alcune app di Windows 11, ma nel caso di Notepad (Blocco note) è solo un cambio di nome e icona. The post Windows 11 senza Copilot: pulizia solo apparente? appeared first on P

items.titolo: Discord Sleuths Gained Unauthorized Access to Anthropic’s Mythos
items.descrizione: Plus: Spy firms tap into a global telecom weakness to track targets, 500,000 UK health records go up for sale on Alibaba, Apple patches a revealing notification bug, and more.

items.titolo: DeepSeek launches 1.6 trillion parameter V4 on Huawei chips as U.S. escalates AI theft accusations — U.S. gov't alleges IP theft by DeepSeek and other Chinese AI firms
items.descrizione: DeepSeek on Friday released a preview of its V4 large language model, the Hangzhou-based startup's most powerful to date.
